home.hero_subtitle: Garden TVET School empowers you with hands-on skills and expert knowledge — building careers and changing lives.
home.programs_desc: Explore our diverse range of vocational programs designed to equip you with practical skills for the modern workforce.
home.why_subtitle: Reasons families and students keep choosing us
home.why_1_desc: Our students learn with modern tools and hands-on labs — real skills for real jobs.
home.why_2_desc: Our staff are seasoned professionals with years of industry experience.
home.why_3_desc: Earn government-recognized qualifications that open doors across Rwanda and beyond.
home.news_subtitle: Stay informed with the latest updates and announcements

faq.q1: How do I apply to Garden TVET School?
faq.a1: You can apply online by clicking the "Apply Now" button on our homepage. Fill in the application form with your personal details, choose your preferred trade and level, and submit. Our admissions team will review your application and contact you.
faq.a2: Minimum requirements include completion of primary education, being of appropriate age (usually 14-25 years), and meeting any specific trade requirements. Some trades may have additional requirements.
faq.q3: How much are the school fees?
faq.a3: School fees vary by program and level. Contact our admissions office for detailed information about tuition costs and payment plans.
faq.a4: Yes, we have hostels available for students. Limited spaces are available and allocation is based on need and availability.
faq.a5: We offer three main trades: Software Development, Automobile Technology, and Building & Construction. Each trade has multiple levels from foundation to advanced.

3.name: Patrick

about.title: About Garden TVET
about.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing quality technical and vocational education that empowers students with practical skills for their future careers.
about.mission_desc: To provide accessible, quality technical and vocational education that equips students with the practical skills and knowledge they need to succeed in their chosen careers.
about.vision_desc: To be a leading TVET institution in Rwanda, producing skilled professionals who contribute to national development.
about.value1_desc: We strive for the highest standards in education and training.
about.value2_desc: We uphold honesty and ethical practices in everything we do.
about.value3_desc: We embrace new ideas and technologies for continuous improvement.
about.leadership_desc: Meet the dedicated team driving our institution forward
about.cta_subtitle: Start your journey to a successful career today.

services.heroDesc: Transform your future with our industry-recognized vocational programs. Learn practical skills from experts and launch your career.
services.readyFutureDesc: Take the first step today and apply to one of our programmes.

hero.title: Driving School
hero.subtitle: Learn road regulations in Rwanda with full and clear explanations

about.title: About the Driving School
about.mission_text: To provide road traffic education in Rwanda so that learners gain the knowledge needed to drive safely and responsibly.
about.services_text: We offer many courses, expert instructors and more. Learners receive full theoretical and practical training to obtain a driving licence in Rwanda.
about.results_text: Learners gain confidence and avoid traffic offences. They become safe and responsible drivers.

courses_data.title: Road Regulations
courses_data.description: Learn all the road regulations of Rwanda so you can drive safely and confidently.

courses_data.title: Vehicle Mechanics
courses_data.description: Learn all vehicle systems: engine, brakes, steering, lights and more, gaining knowledge of vehicle equipment.

courses_data.title: How to Drive a Car
courses_data.description: Learn how to operate a vehicle: starting, gear changes, stopping, parking and more. Take confident trips.

courses_data.title: Driving Practice
courses_data.description: Complete driving practice: parking, reversing, hill start, roundabouts and more. Build real road experience.

courses_data.title: Road Safety
courses_data.description: Learn how to keep yourself safe: signals, seatbelts, speed and weather conditions. Stay safe on the road.

courses_data.title: Driving Test Preparation
courses_data.description: Prepare for the driving theory test so you are licensed to drive. Cover all the official topics.

instructors_data.bio: Expert in road regulations with 10 years of experience.
Experienced trainer in vehicle mechanics and maintenance.
Expert in delivering practical driving lessons.

quiz_data.question: What does a stop sign mean?
quiz_data.explanation: A stop sign means you must come to a complete stop.

quiz_data.question: In Rwanda, on which side of the road do vehicles drive?
quiz_data.explanation: In Rwanda, vehicles drive on the right side of the road.

quiz_data.question: Who has priority on the road?
quiz_data.explanation: Pedestrians have priority on the road.

quiz_data.question: What does a red traffic light mean?
quiz_data.explanation: A red light means you must stop completely.

quiz_data.question: Which sign indicates a road closure?
quiz_data.explanation: The closed-road sign means the road is closed.
